popup.newsletter_title: Clear ideas for websites and digital growth
popup.newsletter_desc: Get short guides, case studies, and practical examples for businesses that want a clearer online presence.

hero.description: We build websites, automations, and digital systems for businesses that need to be understood quickly, trusted faster, and turned into real client actions.

services.section_subtitle: Websites, software, branding, automations, and content for businesses that want to be easier to understand, easier to trust, and easier to contact.

software.title: Software & MVPs
software.subtitle: We build MVPs, dashboards, and web platforms for processes that can no longer be handled efficiently with spreadsheets, messages, and manual work.
points: We turn the idea into a testable MVP with only the necessary functions.
We integrate payments, CRM, ERP, notifications, dashboards, or other important systems.
We build clean architecture that is easier to maintain and extend.
We work in stages, prioritizing real business impact.

website.title: Clear Website & eCommerce
website.subtitle: We build websites, landing pages, and WooCommerce stores that explain the offer without confusion and guide visitors toward contact, purchase, or booking.
points: We clarify your services, products, and difference before design.
We choose the right structure: presentation site, landing page, WooCommerce, or custom.
We optimize for mobile, speed, SEO basics, and buying experience.
We use copy, sections, and CTAs that support decisions, not only appearance.

branding.title: UX/UI & Visual Identity
branding.subtitle: We give the business a coherent visual direction so people quickly understand who you are, what you offer, and why they can trust you.
points: We define visual direction: logo, colors, fonts, style, tone, and components.
We design clean modern interfaces that work on mobile and desktop.
We prepare a Figma design system for faster implementation.
We clarify the user flow to reduce friction and increase trust.

automation.title: Business Automation & AI
automation.subtitle: We automate repetitive processes and connect your website with the tools you already use, so leads, notifications, and data move more clearly.
points: We automate leads, forms, notifications, tasks, and internal processes.
We connect the website with CRM, email, Google Sheets, dashboards, or other apps.
We build useful chatbots for support, lead qualification, or FAQs.
We reduce manual steps and make data easier to track and report.

social-media.title: Content & Digital Communication
social-media.subtitle: We help you communicate clearly and consistently with messages that support the website, offer, and business position.
points: We create content direction adapted to your business and audience.
We write copy and prepare visuals aligned with the brand.
We organize posts so communication stays consistent and easy to follow.
We track results and adjust messages based on what works.

roadmap.section_title: From idea to a website people understand fast.
roadmap.section_desc: The process starts with positioning and continues with structure, content, design, launch, and optimization, so the project is not only attractive but useful.

modal_steps.title: Clear identity
modal_steps.description: We start by clarifying who you are, what you sell, and how clients should perceive you.
points: We define positioning: professional, premium, accessible, or local.
We choose a name that is easy to remember and right for your audience.
We avoid names that are confusing, hard to pronounce, or hard to find online.

modal_steps.title: Right domain
modal_steps.description: We choose a simple, credible web address that works well in ads, business cards, and social media.
points: We check available options for the chosen name.
We choose the right extension: .ro, .com, or another relevant option.
We make sure the domain is short, clean, and easy to type.

modal_steps.title: Memorable logo
modal_steps.description: We create a visual direction that looks professional and can be used consistently on the site and in promotion.
points: We define the style: minimal, elegant, expressive, or technical.
We check that the logo stays clear at small sizes.
We prepare the foundation for a coherent visual identity.

modal_steps.title: Visual style
modal_steps.description: We choose colors, contrast, and accents that support the message and make the site easy to scan.
points: We define the main colors and important accents.
We check readability on desktop and mobile.
We keep the look consistent across all pages.

modal_steps.title: Technical base
modal_steps.description: We prepare the infrastructure so the site is stable, secure, and ready to launch.
points: We choose hosting that fits the size of the project.
We connect the domain, SSL, and essential settings.
We reduce the risk of technical blockers before publishing.

modal_steps.title: Pages that convince
modal_steps.description: We build the structure and copy so visitors quickly understand what you offer and what to do next.
points: We define the necessary pages: home, services, about, contact, and others.
We write or refine copy for clarity and conversion.
We guide users toward action: call, form, order, or booking.

modal_steps.title: Controlled launch
modal_steps.description: We publish only after essential checks, so problems do not appear directly in front of clients.
points: We check copy, forms, links, and mobile display.
We publish the site and test critical elements.
We quickly fix final details that appear after launch.

modal_steps.title: Promotion and growth
modal_steps.description: After launch, we prepare the next step: traffic, visibility, and optimization.
points: We define the right channels: Google, social media, SEO, or campaigns.
We define first steps for promotion and measurement.
We prepare the foundation for testing, adjustments, and better results.

roadmap.modal_hint: Swipe or use the arrows for the next step.

templates.section_subtitle: Explore design, check the preview and open the live demo in a new tab.

case_studies.map_statement: Every project is built around clarity, trust, and a next step that feels easy to take.

cookie.title: Cookies
cookie.necessary_desc: We use strictly necessary cookies for the website to function. These include functional cookies for security, display preferences, and saving your privacy options.
cookie.analytics_desc: With your consent, we may also use technologies such as Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Ads, and Meta Pixel for analytics, performance measurement, and marketing.

contact.hero_desc: Need a website, redesign, online store, automation, branding, or software? Send the details and we will define the next step.
contact.form_error: The message could not be sent. Please try again.
contact.form_sent: Thank you! Your message has been sent.
contact.form_sent_desc: We received your request. If it is urgent, you can write to us directly by email.

faqs.q: What services does Digital Romanian offer?
faqs.a: We build websites, online stores, UX/UI, branding, automation, custom software, digital consulting, and technical support, with a focus on clarity and measurable actions.

faqs.q: How can I start working with Digital Romanian?
faqs.a: You fill in the form or book a call. We start by clarifying the objective, audience, budget, timeline, and suitable solution.

faqs.q: Do you offer ongoing support after the project is finished?
faqs.a: Yes. We can provide post-launch support: updates, security, performance, content adjustments, and technical optimization.

faqs.q: What is the cost of your services?
faqs.a: Costs depend on complexity, number of pages, functions, integrations, content, and support. After clarification we can prepare a concrete offer.

faqs.q: Can you help with rebranding or updating my current website?
faqs.a: Yes. We can analyze your current site, propose a new visual direction, and rebuild the structure for a clearer, more modern experience.

faqs.q: How does Digital Romanian ensure quality?
faqs.a: We work in clear stages, with feedback, technical checks, responsive testing, and adjustments before launch.

faqs.q: How can I stay up to date with my project's progress?
faqs.a: We set clear communication points and show you progress at each stage, so you always know where your project stands.

faqs.q: How long does a project usually take?
faqs.a: A simple site can take a few weeks. An online store, MVP, or custom project may take longer, depending on complexity.

faqs.q: Do you publish useful articles about digital marketing and SEO?
faqs.a: Yes. We regularly publish practical resources for entrepreneurs and local businesses.

services_page.hero_desc: Whether you need a website, branding, automation, or software, we start with the real problem and choose the right solution.

sections.title: 1. Who we are
paragraphs: The digitalromanian.com website is operated by Digital Romanian SRL. For questions about personal data processing, you can contact us at contact@digitalromanian.com.

sections.title: 2. What data we collect
paragraphs: We may collect data such as name, email address, phone number, the message sent through a form, the service selected for booking, and technical information about website usage.

sections.title: 3. How we use data
paragraphs: We use data to respond to requests, manage bookings, send informational materials when you have explicitly consented, and improve the website.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis
paragraphs: Processing may be based on consent, pre-contractual steps, legitimate interest, or legal obligations, depending on the situation.

sections.title: 5. Cookies
paragraphs: By using the website, you accept strictly necessary cookies required for it to function. These may include cookies for security, basic preferences, forms, session handling, and saving your cookie choice.
Analytics, measurement, advertising, or remarketing cookies and technologies are used only if you give consent through the cookie banner, where required.

sections.title: 6. Analytics and marketing technologies
paragraphs: Depending on the website configuration, we may use the following tools:

items.label: Google Analytics
items.text: - for statistics about visits, accessed pages, and website usage.

items.label: Google Tag Manager / Google Tag
items.text: - for managing analytics and marketing scripts.

items.label: Google Ads
items.text: - for measuring conversions and advertising campaign efficiency.

items.label: Meta Pixel
items.text: - for measuring interactions, remarketing, and optimizing Meta campaigns.

sections.title: 7. How long we keep data
paragraphs: We keep data only as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected or as required by applicable legal obligations.

sections.title: 8. Who we may share data with
paragraphs: Data may be shared with providers that help us with hosting, email, analytics, technical maintenance, or similar services, only to the extent necessary.

sections.title: 9. Your rights
paragraphs: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, object to processing, and portability, as well as the right to withdraw consent when processing is based on consent.

sections.title: 10. Contact
paragraphs: For requests regarding personal data, you can write to us at contact@digitalromanian.com.

not_found.title: Page not
not_found.desc: The link may be wrong or the page may have moved. You can quickly return to the important paths on the site.
